<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
    <link
      href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto:ital,wght@0,100;0,300;0,400;0,500;0,700;0,900;1,100;1,300;1,400;1,500;1,700;1,900&display=swap"
      rel="stylesheet"
    />
    <title>Welcome to Ticet Edu</title>
  </head>
  <style>
    body {
      width: 100%;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      margin: 0px;
    }

    #body {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 8px;
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 680px;
      margin: 10px 10px 4px 10px;
    }
    /* Medium screens (md) */
    @media (min-width: 768px) {
      #body {
        margin: 40px 40px 4px 40px;
        gap: 15px;
      }
    }
    /* Extra Large screens (xl) */
    @media (min-width: 1280px) {
      #body {
        margin: 80px 80px 4px 80px;
        gap: 20px;
      }
    }

    #header-content {
      width: 100%;
      height: min-content;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 0px;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 0px;
      padding: 120px 0px;
      background-image: url("./email-assets/ticet_header_bg.jpg");
      background-repeat: no-repeat;
      background-size: cover;
      background-attachment: local;
      background-position: center;
      border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px;
    }

    #main {
      height: auto;
    }

    #main-content,
    #footer-content {
      margin: 10px;
    }
    /* Medium screens (md) */
    @media (min-width: 768px) {
      #main-content,
      #footer-content {
        margin: 15px;
      }
    }
    /* Extra Large screens (xl) */
    @media (min-width: 1280px) {
      #main-content,
      #footer-content {
        margin: 20px;
      }
    }

    #footer {
      height: min-content;
      background-color: #3f4257;
    }

    #footer-content {
      border-top: 1px solid #f3f2f0;
      padding: 20px 0px;
      color: #f3f2f0;
      display: flex;
      gap: 0px;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      text-align: center;
    }
    /* Small screens (sm) */
    @media (min-width: 640px) {
      #footer-content {
        align-items: start;
        text-align: start;
      }
    }

    #footer-content #external-links {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
    }
    /* Small screens (sm) */
    @media (min-width: 640px) {
      #footer-content #external-links {
        flex-direction: row;
      }
    }

    #email-subject {
      display: none;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .preheader {
      display: none;
      max-height: 0;
      overflow: hidden;
      color: #ffffff;
      font-size: 1px;
      line-height: 1px;
      opacity: 0;
    }

    h1 {
      font-family: "Roboto", serif;
      font-weight: 500;
      font-style: normal;
      font-size: 2rem;
      font-weight: 400;
      color: rgb(103 80 164);
    }
    /* Medium screens (md) */
    @media (min-width: 768px) {
      h1 {
        font-size: 2.5rem;
      }
    }
    /* Extra Large screens (xl) */
    @media (min-width: 1280px) {
      h1 {
        font-size: 3rem;
      }
    }

    p {
      font-family: "Roboto", serif;
      font-weight: 400;
      font-style: normal;
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      color: rgb(15 15 15);
      line-height: 1.75rem;
    }

    a {
      color: rgb(33 149 242);
      text-decoration: none;
    }
  </style>
  <body>
    <div id="body">
      <p class="preheader">
        We’re thrilled to have you as part of our learning community
      </p>
      <p id="email-subject">Welcome to Ticet Edu!!!</p>
      <section id="header" style="width: 100%">
        <div id="header-content">
          <svg
            width="300"
            viewBox="0 0 282 101"
            fill="none"
            xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
          >

              d="M8.86523 53.9312H51.6706L57.841 66.7375H17.7461L8.86523 53.9312Z"

              stroke-width="0.000766923"
            />

      </section>
      <section id="main">
        <div id="main-content">
          <p style="margin-top: 40px; font-size: larger">Hello {{name}},</p>
          <h1>Welcome to Ticet Edu</h1>
          <p>
            We’re thrilled to have you as part of our learning community. Ticet
            Edu is all about empowering you with collaborative and engaging
            learning experiences, and we’re here to support you every step of
            the way.
          </p>

          <p style="margin: 40px 0px">
            <strong>Role: {{ accountType }}</strong>
          </p>

          <p>
            Please take a moment to review our <a href="">Terms of Use</a>,
            <a href="">Privacy Policy</a>, and
            <a href="">Data Protection Policy</a> to help us maintain a
            respectful and safe environment for everyone. By following these
            guidelines, you’ll contribute to a positive, supportive space for
            all users.
          </p>

          <p>
            If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to contact
            us at
            <a
              href="mailto:info@ticetedu.com"
              style="color: rgb(33 149 242); margin: 0px"
              >info@ticetedu.com</a
            >.
          </p>

          <p>Thank you for being part of the Ticet Edu community.</p>

          <p style="margin-top: 40px">Warm regards,</p>
          <p>Ticet Edu Team</p>
        </div>
      </section>
      <section id="footer">
